title: Modern Life Patch
description: A patch was made due to too many flaws in the original author's graphic design.
body:
This mod makes several adjustments to the original mod for a few reasons:

1. The original mod's texture style is too rigid, making it hard to integrate with Minecraft's aesthetic.
2. The i18n support is incomplete; many areas still use hardcoded text translations instead of key-based translations.
3. Although Simplified Chinese translations were added, most are machine-translated, which has been a common complaint in the Chinese community.

As a result, this mod includes the following changes:

1. Modified many original items and block models through texture pack overrides.
2. Adjusted collision boxes using Mixin technology to fit the new models.
3. Replaced original text values with Mixin technology to support i18n functionality.

If we can't contact the original author, more changes may come in the future:
* Modify the handgun mechanics.
* Add more recipes.
* Based on this, introduce new items (to be determined).

A patch was made due to too many flaws in the original author's graphic design.
   
All of tetxures and models are created by BF_Meow，Do not use for other purposes without permission.
